channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: American AI is costly; some startups turn to cheaper Chinese models
item.description: AI is a fast-growing business expense. Some companies are cutting costs by switching to cheaper Chinese AI models.

item.title: Todd Blanche's confirmation brings Epstein survivor into spotlight
item.description: Dani Bensky and other women abused by Jeffrey Epstein have formed a close-knit "survivor sisterhood," navigating two different worlds.

item.title: U.S.-Iran tensions escalate over the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Iran warned it would block regional oil exports on Wednesday, retaliating against the U.S. naval blockade of Iranian ports in the Strait.

item.title: CDC director nominee Erica Schwartz appears before Senate for confirmation hearing
item.description: Dr. Erica Schwartz, Trump's pick for CDC director, faces the Senate health committee on July 15. If confirmed, she will...
